query:
SELECT m1.id, m1.messageId, m1.sessionId, m1.tenantId, m1.remoteJid, m1.content, 
       m2.id as dup_id, m2.sessionId as dup_session, m2.tenantId as dup_tenant
FROM messages m1
JOIN messages m2 ON m1.messageId = m2.messageId AND m1.id < m2.id
WHERE m1.messageId IS NOT NULL
LIMIT 3;
